channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-22 05:35 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Quantity has a quality all its own TERAFAB
item.description: Quantity has a quality all its own TERAFAB

item.title: @elonmusk: T͢E͢R͢A͢F͢A͢B͢ Launch ⌨ Goal: adding a trillion watts of compute, 2x the entire U.S. electricity mar...
item.description: T͢E͢R͢A͢F͢A͢B͢ Launch ⌨ Goal: adding a trillion watts of compute, 2x the entire U.S. electricity market, every year. A new 2nm fab to build ~1 billion AI chips/year. Most will be in space. "We have an announcement to make: the most epic chip-building effort by far." —@ElonMusktonight Live now ►xcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1yKAPMzlv…

item.title: @elonmusk: Terafab was the final missing piece of the puzzle
item.description: Terafab was the final missing piece of the puzzle

item.title: @elonmusk: In case you want to relive the epic Terafab intro over and over again. “In order to understand the u...
item.description: In case you want to relive the epic Terafab intro over and over again. “In order to understand the universe you must explore the universe” - Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: The most exciting of times ahead!
item.description: The most exciting of times ahead!

item.title: @elonmusk: There it is the first AI Sat concept with solar panels & radiators to scale … 100kw scale.
item.description: There it is the first AI Sat concept with solar panels & radiators to scale … 100kw scale.

item.title: @elonmusk: Kardashev II or you’re not even trying
item.description: Kardashev II or you’re not even trying

item.title: @elonmusk: It simply can’t be overstated how important building a chip fab of this scale in the United States i...
item.description: It simply can’t be overstated how important building a chip fab of this scale in the United States is for our national security. More than 90% of the world’s current production of chips are in Taiwan. TERAFAB is vital to our national security interests.

item.title: @elonmusk: “I just want to live long enough to see the mass driver on the moon. Because that’s going to be incr...
item.description: “I just want to live long enough to see the mass driver on the moon. Because that’s going to be incredibly epic.” —@ElonMusktonight

item.title: @elonmusk: Can’t have a more exciting vision for the future!! Come join us to make this the reality. To the sta...
item.description: Can’t have a more exciting vision for the future!! Come join us to make this the reality. To the stars, let’s go ✨

item.title: @elonmusk: TERAFAB: the next step to becoming a galactic civilization Together with@Tesla&@xAI, we're building ...
item.description: TERAFAB: the next step to becoming a galactic civilization Together with@Tesla&@xAI, we're building the largest chip manufacturing facility ever (1TW/year) – combining logic, memory & advanced packaging under one roof

item.title: @elonmusk: In case you were wondering, the green circle is where orbital data centers start to become profitabl...
item.description: In case you were wondering, the green circle is where orbital data centers start to become profitable.

item.title: @elonmusk: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe →x.ai/careers
item.description: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe →x.ai/careers

item.title: @elonmusk: How could you not be excited about the future! This is what Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI are building, abu...
item.description: How could you not be excited about the future! This is what Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI are building, abundance for all!

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go t...
item.description: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go to space, as US electricity is only 0.5TW
